nodes.clue: Rusty played a sealed "gift deck" — handed to him by a hooded official of the court.
nodes.intro: A tinker looks up from a half-built contraption. "Oh! Here to duel? I'm Rusty — sort of the doorman. Beat me and I'll point you up the road." He grins and shuffles, dropping half his cards.
nodes.subtitle: A friendly warm-up in the workshop.
nodes.victory: "Wow, you're really good!" Rusty beams and points up the road. "There's a gambler in the parlor ahead. Tell her I said hi — actually, don't."

nodes.clue: A half-burnt ledger in the parlor names a hidden patron bankrolling the rigged games.
nodes.intro: Rusty's directions lead to a smoky parlor. A gambler fans her cards without looking up. "Rusty sent you? Cute. I'll wager you don't make it past the knight at the bridge."
nodes.subtitle: The gambler deals you in.
nodes.victory: Mireille flicks you a chip. "Beginner's luck. The knight at the bridge won't be half so charmed. Off you go, lucky."

nodes.clue: Aldous swears the Empress died at the table — with a hexed card already in play.
nodes.intro: A bridge, and a knight in weathered armor. "The gambler's coin says you'll fall here. Prove her right, or prove her wrong — but you do not cross without a duel."
nodes.subtitle: The knight bars the bridge.
nodes.victory: The knight lowers his shield. "The crossing is yours. Beyond lies the witch — guard your cards, and your wits."

nodes.clue: Vesper's hex-craft orders bear a wax seal: the mark of the Lord Regent.
nodes.intro: Beyond the bridge, a witch's parlor glitters with hexes. "The knight let you pass? How careless of him. I serve the Grandmaster, and I do so love to make examples."
nodes.subtitle: The hexweaver's glittering parlor.
nodes.victory: Her hexes unravel in a puff of smoke. "Fine! Go on to him, then. Koll has never lost. You'll make a lovely cautionary tale."

nodes.clue: Koll was never the master. The Regent — Corvane — steps from behind the throne he kept empty.
nodes.intro: At last, the throne room. The Grandmaster does not rise. "Vesper's hexes failed. Curious. Sit. Let us see if you are the one the prophecies kept boring me with."
nodes.subtitle: The grandmaster's throne. None have won.
nodes.victory: Koll is silent a long moment, then inclines his head. "The streak ends. The table is yours, champion — and the kingdom will learn your name."

opponents.intro: Oh, a challenger! Go easy on me, I'm still learning the ropes.
opponents.name: Rusty
opponents.onLose: Aw, beans. Good game though — you've got a real knack for this!
opponents.onWin: I won? I WON! Wait 'til the workshop hears about this!
opponents.persona: a cheerful, clumsy novice tinkerer who plays it safe and roots for everyone
opponents.taunt: Huh, that actually worked? Beginner's luck, I swear!
opponents.tauntAhead: Wait, am I actually ahead? Don't tell anyone!
opponents.tauntBehind: Okay, okay, I can still turn this around… probably.
opponents.title: the Tinker

opponents.intro: Care to make it interesting? I do love long odds.
opponents.name: Mireille
opponents.onLose: Well played. I'll want a rematch — double or nothing.
opponents.onWin: The house always wins. Better luck next hand.
opponents.persona: a smooth, confident card sharp who loves a risky, opportunistic play
opponents.tauntAhead: The cards are falling my way — as they always do.
opponents.tauntBehind: A losing hand is just a setup for a bigger bluff.
opponents.title: the Gambler

opponents.intro: Stand and be tested. Hold your ground, and we shall see who endures.
opponents.name: Sir Aldous
opponents.onLose: Bested, fair and square. Well met, champion.
opponents.onWin: A hard-fought field. You have my respect.
opponents.persona: a stoic, honorable knight who fights a patient war of territory and walls
opponents.taunt: A line held is a battle half won.
opponents.tauntAhead: The field is mine. Press, and you will break upon it.
opponents.tauntBehind: A knight does not yield. I will hold to the last.
opponents.title: the Steadfast

opponents.intro: Let's see how your little cards fare against my hexes, hm?
opponents.name: Vesper
opponents.onLose: Impossible… my hexes, undone? You'll regret this.
opponents.onWin: Did you really think you'd unravel me?
opponents.persona: a sly, theatrical witch who delights in buffs, hexes and aggressive swings
opponents.tauntAhead: You're already unraveling. I do love to watch.
opponents.tauntBehind: No matter — a hex always has the last laugh.
opponents.title: the Hexweaver

opponents.intro: Many sit at this table. None rise victorious. Begin.
opponents.name: Grandmaster Koll
opponents.onLose: …So. The streak ends. You have earned your place.
opponents.onWin: As expected. The throne remains mine.
opponents.persona: a calm, ruthless grandmaster who has not lost a duel in living memory
opponents.taunt: Every move you make, I made three turns ago.
opponents.tauntAhead: It is already decided. You simply have not realized.
opponents.tauntBehind: Curious. I will allow you this small moment.
opponents.title: the Unbeaten

packs.name: The Rustmarch
packs.summary: Act I — the frontier where the Bloodright begins.

packs.name: The Gilded Delta
packs.summary: Act II — gambling dens where the odds are rigged.

packs.name: The Ashen Keep
packs.summary: Act III — the ruined fortress where the Empress fell.

packs.name: The Hexfen
packs.summary: Act IV — the swamp where the hexed cards are wrought.

packs.name: The Obsidian Court
packs.summary: Act V — the capital, and the truth behind the throne.

packs.name: Wandering Legends
packs.summary: Roaming legendary duelists — earn or unlock, then play anywhere.

provinces.name: The Rustmarch
provinces.theme: Frontier scrubland; warm brass, workshop airs.

provinces.name: The Gilded Delta
provinces.theme: Riverboats and gambling dens; violet neon, swing.

provinces.name: The Ashen Keep
provinces.theme: A ruined royal fortress; steel-blue, choral.

provinces.name: The Hexfen
provinces.theme: A corrupted swamp; sickly magenta, dissonant.

provinces.name: The Obsidian Court
provinces.theme: The capital; gold to blood. The Regent's seat.

provinces.name: Wandering Legends
provinces.theme: Roaming premium bosses outside the plot; realm-myth flavor.
